mapper.select: /* 미등록 자료 배포 요청 정보 조회 */ SELECT req.REQUEST_NO AS requestNo, reqDtl.REQUEST_DESC AS requestDesc, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD) AS deployUserNm, deploy.DEPLOY_USER_EMAIL AS deployEmail, com.COMPANY_NM AS deployCompanyNm, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = reqAccDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS purchaserUserNm, (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = reqAppDtl.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS teamLeader, req.REQUEST_PURPOSE AS requestPurpose, req.DEPLOY_TERM AS deployTerm, req.PRINT_YN AS printYn, req.DEPLOY_NORMAL_YN AS deployNormalYn, req.DEPLOY_SPECIAL_YN AS deploySpecialYn FROM DOCS_REQUEST req LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqDtl ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqDtl.REQUEST_NO AND reqDtl.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqAppDtl ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqAppDtl.REQUEST_NO AND reqAppDtl.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND reqAppDtl.APPROVAL_GRADE_CD = 'TL' LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqAccDtl ON req.REQUEST_NO = reqAccDtl.REQUEST_NO AND reqAccDtl.ACTION_CD = 'ACCEPT' JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY deploy ON req.REQUEST_NO = deploy.REQUEST_NO JOIN DOCS_USER userInfo ON deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD = userInfo.USER_CD JOIN DOCS_COMPANY com ON userInfo.COMPANY_CD = com.COMPANY_CD WHERE req.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

/* 미등록 자료 배포 요청 아이템 리스트 조회 */ SELECT unreg.OBJECT_NM AS objectNm, unreg.OBJECT_TYPE AS objectType, reqFile.ORG_FILE_NM AS fileNm, reqFile.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, reqFile.REQUEST_NO AS requestNo, reqFile.FILE_NO AS fileNo FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMap JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE reqFile ON reqMap.OBJECT_ID = reqFile.OBJECT_ID AND reqMap.REQUEST_NO = reqFile.REQUEST_NO JOIN DOCS_UNREG_INFO unreg ON reqFile.OBJECT_ID = unreg.OBJECT_ID WHERE reqMap.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
mapper.insert: /* 최종 승인(DOCS_APPROVAL_FILE)에 추가 */ INSERT INTO DOCS_APPROVAL_FILE ( REQUEST_NO, INSERT_USER_CD, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_USER_CD, UPDATE_DT, OBJECT_ID, DEPLOY_USER_CD, FILE_NO ) VALUES ( #{requestNo}, #{sessionUser.userCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{sessionUser.userCd}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{objectId}, (SELECT DEPLOY_USER_CD FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} LIMIT 1), #{fileNo} )
mapper.update: /* 배포 요청 상세 수정 */ UPDATE DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL SET REQUEST_DESC = #{rejectDesc}, ACTION_CD = #{actionCd}, ACTION_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'APPROVAL' AND APPROVAL_GRADE_CD = 'TL'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING reqMap JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_FILE reqFile ON reqMap.OBJECT_ID = reqFile.OBJECT_ID AND reqMap.REQUEST_NO = reqFile.REQUEST_NO JOIN DOCS_UNREG_INFO unreg ON reqFile.OBJECT_ID = unreg.OBJECT_ID WHERE reqMap.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
